messages.author: Ethan W7ZOO
messages.text: I'm monitoring the letsmesh channel viewer during testing of node deployment and I'm seeing duplicate messages come in from a single send on my end. See screenshot. Packet 1: https://analyzer.letsmesh.net/packets?packet_hash=20E0A4C122FB1E4D Packet 2: https://analyzer.letsmesh.net/packets?packet_hash=E77B9A9AE9E30B0D Looking for insight into why. New behavior since I switched to multibyte (2 byte) so on the lookout for issues. Why is the message, sent once, being identified as two separate messages? (trying to ensure my nodes are good citizens here)
messages.content_html: I'm monitoring the letsmesh channel viewer during testing of node deployment and I'm seeing duplicate messages come in from a single send on my end. See screenshot. Packet 1: https://analyzer.letsmesh.net/packets?packet_hash=20E0A4C122FB1E4D Packet 2: https://analyzer.letsmesh.net/packets?packet_hash=E77B9A9AE9E30B0D Looking for insight into why. New behavior since I switched to multibyte (2 byte) so on the lookout for issues. Why is the message, sent once, being identified as two separate messages? (trying to ensure my nodes are good citizens here)
